tiles.title: Glossy Blue Ceramic
tiles.description: Transform your living space with this premium glossy blue ceramic tile. Featuring a stunning, vibrant finish that beautifully catches the light, it is perfectly suited for creating eye-catching feature walls or modern kitchen backsplashes. Highly durable and exceptionally easy to clean.

tiles.title: Classic White Marble
tiles.description: Elevate your home's aesthetic with our elegant classic white marble tile. Showcasing striking natural grey veining across a pristine background, this luxurious material adds timeless beauty and sophistication to any bathroom, hallway, or premium commercial flooring project you are planning.

tiles.title: Matte Black Porcelain
tiles.description: Achieve a sleek, contemporary look with our modern matte black porcelain tile. Designed for minimalist aesthetics, this robust flooring solution offers an ultra-smooth, non-reflective surface that effortlessly hides smudges while providing unmatched durability for high-traffic residential and commercial interior spaces.

tiles.title: Rustic Terracotta Floor
tiles.description: Bring warmth and traditional charm to your home with our rustic terracotta floor tile. Crafted from natural clay, this earthy material provides a beautifully textured, non-slip surface that is highly ideal for Mediterranean-style patios, sunrooms, and cozy farmhouse-inspired kitchen environments.

tiles.title: Ocean Glass Mosaic
tiles.description: Create a breathtaking aquatic oasis with our ocean glass mosaic tile. Featuring a mesmerizing blend of deep blue and seafoam green shades, these tiny reflective squares are expertly designed for luxurious swimming pools, spa enclosures, and stunning bathroom shower walls.

tiles.title: Calacatta Gold Marble
tiles.description: Indulge in ultimate luxury with our magnificent Calacatta gold marble tile. Imported directly from Italy, it features a creamy white base beautifully intertwined with rich gold and subtle grey veins, making it the perfect statement piece for upscale interior design.

tiles.title: Grey Concrete Look
tiles.description: Embrace the trendy industrial style with our grey concrete-look porcelain tile. Perfectly mimicking the raw, edgy texture of poured cement, this highly resilient flooring option brings an urban loft vibe to your living room without the difficult maintenance of real concrete.

tiles.title: Subway White Gloss
tiles.description: Revitalize your culinary space with our classic white subway tile. Offering a brilliant glossy finish and traditional rectangular shape, this timeless design reflects ambient light beautifully, making small kitchens and compact bathrooms feel significantly more spacious, bright, and impeccably clean.

tiles.title: Emerald Green Zellige
tiles.description: Add vibrant character to your walls with our handcrafted emerald green Zellige tile. Inspired by traditional Moroccan artistry, these glazed clay pieces feature subtle surface imperfections and rich color variations that create a deeply authentic, artisanal atmosphere in any room.

tiles.title: Dark Granite Slab
tiles.description: Ensure long-lasting performance with our incredibly durable dark granite slab tile. Engineered to withstand extremely heavy foot traffic and daily wear, this densely packed natural stone delivers a formidable, sophisticated presence ideal for commercial lobbies, grand hallways, and outdoor entryways.

tiles.title: Vintage Pattern Tile
tiles.description: Infuse your home with nostalgic charm using our decorative vintage pattern tile. Showcasing an intricately detailed retro geometric motif, this premium porcelain option serves as a captivating focal point for entryways, kitchen floors, and stylish bohemian-inspired bathroom renovation projects.

tiles.title: Wood Look Planks
tiles.description: Enjoy the visual warmth of hardwood combined with the resilience of porcelain using our wood-look plank tiles. These highly realistic pieces effectively capture natural grain textures and rich brown tones, providing a moisture-proof flooring solution perfect for kitchens and basements.

tiles.title: Terrazzo Floor Stone
tiles.description: Incorporate a playful yet sophisticated element into your interior design with our trendy terrazzo floor tile. Embedded with a colorful array of recycled marble and glass chips, this remarkably durable composite material offers a seamlessly smooth, eye-catching surface for modern spaces.

tiles.title: Travertine Stone Wall
tiles.description: Enhance your architectural features with our natural travertine stone tile. Boasting an unpolished, highly textured surface full of organic character, this premium earthly material is an outstanding choice for constructing striking fireplace surrounds, rustic accent walls, and elegant outdoor verandas.

tiles.title: Metallic Bronze Tile
tiles.description: Make a bold architectural statement with our striking metallic bronze wall tile. Designed with an innovative reflective glaze that mimics aged metal, this dramatic ceramic piece instantly elevates the mood, providing a deeply luxurious and industrial ambiance for modern interiors.

tiles.title: Slate Black Stone
tiles.description: Upgrade your exterior spaces with our rugged black slate tile. Naturally cleft to provide an anti-slip texture, this incredibly dense natural stone effortlessly withstands harsh weather conditions, making it the ultimate premium choice for garden pathways, patios, and outdoor kitchens.

tiles.title: Moroccan Encaustic
tiles.description: Celebrate cultural artistry with our beautiful Moroccan encaustic cement tile. Meticulously handcrafted to feature traditional, vividly colored geometric motifs, these thick and durable tiles are exceptional for creating vibrant kitchen backsplashes, decorative stair risers, and uniquely stunning front porch landings.

tiles.title: Hexagon Abstract Tile
tiles.description: Break away from conventional grid layouts with our contemporary hexagon abstract tile. The unique six-sided geometric shape allows for creative, interlocking installation patterns, delivering a highly modern, visually dynamic aesthetic perfectly suited for cutting-edge bathroom floors and sophisticated shower enclosures.

tiles.title: White Bathroom Hexagon
tiles.description: Achieve a clean, minimalist aesthetic with our small white hexagon mosaic tiles. Supplied on convenient mesh-backed sheets for rapid installation, these bright, uniformly shaped ceramics offer excellent slip resistance and a refreshing, timeless look for compact residential and commercial bathrooms.

tiles.title: Kitchen Backsplash Marble
tiles.description: Upgrade your culinary workstation with our premium kitchen backsplash marble tile. Expertly cut from classic Carrara stone into elegant contemporary shapes, it offers unparalleled sophistication, exceptional heat resistance, and a beautifully smooth surface that effortlessly elevates your home’s interior decor.

tiles.title: Navy Blue Herringbone
tiles.description: Transform your walls into a work of art with our navy blue herringbone tile. The deep, rich oceanic tones paired with the classic zigzag installation pattern create a sophisticated, tailored appearance that works wonderfully in transitional kitchens and upscale bathrooms.

tiles.title: Cream Travertine Paver
tiles.description: Design a breathtaking pool deck with our luxurious cream travertine paver tile. This tumbled natural stone remains remarkably cool under direct sunlight and features a naturally porous, slip-resistant texture, perfectly combining elegant Mediterranean style with essential outdoor safety and durability.

tiles.title: Silver Metallic Porcelain
tiles.description: Introduce a futuristic, high-tech aesthetic to your space with our silver metallic porcelain tile. Manufactured with a specialized luminous glaze, it subtly reflects ambient room lighting to produce a stunning, expansive visual effect ideal for modern commercial and residential interiors.

tiles.title: Onyx Feature Slab
tiles.description: Create an unforgettable focal point with our magnificent onyx feature slab tile. Featuring mesmerizing translucent properties and dramatic swirling bands of color, this exquisite natural stone can be spectacularly backlit to illuminate high-end hotel lobbies, exclusive bars, and luxury bathrooms.

tiles.title: Matte White Penny
tiles.description: Embrace charming vintage design with our matte white penny round mosaic tile. These delightful, coin-sized circular pieces provide incredible underfoot traction due to abundant grout lines, making them an incredibly safe, stylish, and practical flooring option for wet shower environments.

tiles.title: Charcoal Slate Panel
tiles.description: Enhance your property's exterior with our striking charcoal slate ledger panel tile. This heavily textured, three-dimensional stacked stone cladding delivers a deeply rustic yet undeniably modern architectural finish, perfect for accentuating retaining walls, majestic fireplace pillars, and premium home facades.

tiles.title: Polished Beige Crema
tiles.description: Brighten your living spaces effortlessly with our highly polished beige crema marble tile. Offering a warm, inviting neutral color palette and an ultra-reflective, mirror-like finish, this magnificent stone drastically amplifies natural sunlight, creating an incredibly spacious and welcoming room atmosphere.

tiles.title: Geometric 3D Wall
tiles.description: Instantly modernize your interior decor with our innovative geometric 3D wall tile. Featuring a raised, sculpted surface that playfully interacts with directional lighting to cast dynamic shadows, it serves as an exceptional conversation starter for contemporary living rooms and offices.

tiles.title: Rustic Oak Porcelain
tiles.description: Capture the rugged essence of distressed timber with our rustic oak porcelain plank tile. Engineered to meticulously replicate the knots, cracks, and rich color variations of aged hardwood, it delivers extraordinary waterproof performance for modern kitchens, basements, and busy hallways.

tiles.title: Aqua Blue Scallop
tiles.description: Infuse a soothing, coastal-inspired ambiance into your home with our gorgeous aqua blue scallop tile. Often referred to as fish scale tile, its graceful, overlapping curved design and serene aquatic hues create a truly enchanting backsplash or striking bathroom feature.
